Off Calendar Mar-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances - Court adopted its tentative ruling, PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR PARTNERS, A PARTNERSHIP DOING BUSINESS Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is denied in part. The judgment debtor is directed to pay $150.00 per pay period for payment on account of the debt. Order issue at hearing. Rebecca Woodson Judge Pro Tem, not reported. (302/JPT)
